basic_details.job_title: OPTCL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 Through GATE Notification Out - Apply Online for 60 Posts
basic_details.short_information: OPTCL Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 60 vacancies for Management Trainee posts. Candidates can apply online only from 26.05.2026 to 25.06.2026 through OPTCL website optcl.co.in.

age_limit.age_details: Candidate must be able to read, write, and speak Odia fluently and must have passed Middle School Exam with Odia as language subject; OR Matriculation/equivalent with Odia as medium; OR Odia as language subject in Class VII final exam from a recognized school; OR passed a test in Odia in Middle English School Standard conducted by School and Mass Education Department/BSE Odisha.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Electrical / Electrical & Electronics Engineering with minimum 60% marks in aggregate from a recognized University/Institution; OR Passing of Section A & B of IE (India) in relevant discipline with minimum 50% marks in aggregate. For SC/ST/PwBD candidates, minimum 50% marks required.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Matrix: Rs. 56,100 – Rs. 1,77,500 (Level EE-2) as Assistant Manager (Electrical); CTC approximately Rs. 15 Lakhs per annum

selection_process: GATE 2026 Score (90% weightage) + Personal Interview (10% weightage) + Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only through the OPTCL website (www.optcl.co.in). No other mode of application will be accepted. No hard copy of the application is required to be sent to any address. Before applying, candidates must have their GATE 2026 Registration Number, valid GATE 2026 Score Card, Odia Pass Certificate, degree certificate and mark sheets, and other required documents ready in prescribed format for upload.

basic_details.job_title: RRB ALP (CEN 01/2026) Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 11,127 Assistant Loco Pilot Posts
basic_details.short_information: RRB Recruitment 2026 offers 11,127 vacancies for Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) posts. Eligible candidates with Diploma, ITI, B.E/B.Tech can apply online from 15-05-2026 to 14-06-2026 through the official RRB website, rrbapply.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Ministry of Railways, Government of India (Various Zonal Railways)

qualification.education_qualification: Any Graduate, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma, ITI

salary_details.pay_scale: Level-2 in 7th CPC Pay Matrix; Initial Pay Rs. 19,900/-

selection_process: CBT-1 (75 marks) + CBT-2 (Part A: 100 marks + Part B: 75 marks qualifying) + CBAT + Document Verification + Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the official websites of participating RRBs (listed at Para 13.7 of the CEN). Hard copy / offline applications will not be accepted under any circumstances. The online portal is active from 15-05-2026 to 14-06-2026 (23:59 Hrs.). Candidates must first create an account on the RRB portal. Those who created an account for CENs notified in 2024/2025 should use the same credentials. Details filled in the "Create an Account" form (including mobile number, email ID) and the chosen RRB cannot be modified at any stage after account creation. Candidates can apply to only one RRB and submit only one application - multiple applications to the same or different RRBs will result in rejection of all applications and debarment from future RRB/RRC exams. Aadhaar or DigiLocker authentication is strongly advised during account creation for a smoother recruitment process. A live photograph is captured during the online application; pre-existing photographs are not accepted. No documents need to be uploaded at application stage (except signature and SC/ST certificate for free travel pass, if applicable).
seo_tags: Railway Recruitment Boards Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) Recruitment 2026

basic_details.job_title: Vikram Dev University Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 110 Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor Posts
basic_details.short_information: Vikram Dev University Recruitment 2026: 110 Faculty vacancies. Apply online from 12 May to 10 June 2026 at vikramdevuniversity.ac.in.
basic_details.application_mode: Online (HIMS portal) + submission of hard copy by post

selection_process: Constituted as per UGC Regulations Notification No. F.1-2/2017(EC/PS) dated 18 July 2018.
how_to_apply: Visit the HIMS recruitment portal at https://himsrecruitment.odisha.gov.in/ from 12.05.2026 onwards and access the online application link for Vikram Dev University faculty posts.
Register on the portal, then fill the online application form in all respects with correct personal, academic and experience details as per UGC and University requirements.
Upload all required supporting documents (certificates, mark sheets, experience, reservation documents, etc.) in the prescribed format along with the online form.
Pay the applicable non-refundable application processing fee online to the specified SBI bank account of Vikram Dev University and ensure proper entry of payment details.
Submit the online application form on or before 10.06.2026 (11:59 PM), ensuring it is complete in all respects.
Download and take a printout of the submitted application form from the portal.

Send the signed printout of the downloaded application along with all certificates, mark sheets and supporting documents by Registered/Speed Post only to: The Registrar, Vikram Dev University, Jeypore, Dist- Koraput, Odisha, PIN-764001 so as to reach on or before 20.06.2026 by 5.00 PM.
Keep proof of dispatch and payment details for future reference. For details and updates, regularly check the University website.
